evals.prompt: /prototype 요약, 번역, 쉽게 설명 중 하나만 고르는 프롬프트 컨트롤이 필요해. 세 옵션은 항상 보여야 하고 즉시 적용돼. 디자인 시스템은 Select를 좁은 공간, Checkbox를 복수 선택, RadioGroup을 소수의 상호 배타적 선택에 쓰도록 정해뒀어. 드롭다운, 그룹 버튼, 체크박스를 비교하는 프로토타입을 만들어야 할까?
evals.expected_output: The response returns the design-system answer instead of building an artifact: use the existing single-choice group pattern. It explains briefly why the established semantics settle the question and does not manufacture alternatives merely because prototype was invoked.
expectations: The response declines to build a prototype because established interaction semantics already answer the question.
It recommends the existing RadioGroup or equivalent group control.
It explains why checkbox and dropdown conflict with the confirmed selection and visibility constraints.
It does not create variants, an experiment profile, or a preservation branch.

evals.prompt: /prototype 기존 결과 화면에서 LLM 작업을 항상 펼쳐둘지, 'LLM으로 열기'를 누른 뒤 보여줄지 실제로 비교하고 싶어. Markdown 읽기가 기본 작업이고 LLM 전송이 두 번째 작업이라는 점, 기존 셸·컴포넌트·대표 데이터는 그대로 유지해. 이 한 질문만 판단할 수 있게 만들어줘.
evals.expected_output: The response creates the cheapest in-context comparison with two materially different variants, changing only the reveal behavior. It stubs irrelevant writes, asks the user to react, and states what the reaction reveals. It does not impose provenance, fidelity, or branch-reporting ceremony.
expectations: The artifact compares persistent LLM controls against controls revealed on demand while holding every other confirmed constraint fixed.
It uses the existing product context and components when available and representative data rather than redesigning the page.
Irrelevant backend or mutation behavior is stubbed.
The response asks for the user's reaction and is prepared to state what that reaction reveals.
It folds the confirmed choice into the issue artifact and discards the losing variant, without treating either as production code.
It does not require an experiment profile, component-provenance inventory, or dedicated branch report.

evals.prompt: /prototype 공개 URL을 Defuddle로 Markdown으로 바꾸는 새 서비스라 아직 제품 코드와 디자인 시스템이 없어. 결과 화면에서 프롬프트 프리셋을 본문 위에 둘지, 'LLM으로 열기' 흐름 안에 둘지는 실제로 봐야 판단할 수 있어. 제목, 저자, Markdown 미리보기, 복사, md 다운로드, ChatGPT와 Claude 열기, 직접 입력, 다크 모드 요구사항은 고정하고 이 한 질문만 비교해줘.
evals.expected_output: With no host product available, the response builds a self-contained comparison using representative Korean fake data. Two or three variants differ materially only in prompt placement, every fixed requirement remains represented, and irrelevant extraction or export behavior is stubbed. The response asks for a reaction rather than presenting the comparison as settled.
expectations: The artifact is self-contained because no real product context or component library exists.
It uses representative Korean fake content and stubs Defuddle, export, and external LLM behavior that is irrelevant to prompt placement.
It presents two or three variants that differ materially on prompt placement while holding the other requirements fixed.
It maintains enough coherence to judge the question without defaulting to deliberately low visual fidelity.
It asks the user to react and states what the reaction reveals.
It does not create or preserve a branch merely to archive the prototype.

evals.prompt: /prototype artifacts/url-to-md/ 이슈를 이어서 진행해. 헤더 밀도는 지난 비교에서 제목·저자·읽기 시간 구성으로 확정했어. 이번에는 프리셋 선택 영역을 본문 위에 고정할지, 스크롤하면 상단에 붙게 할지 이 한 가지만 비교해줘.
evals.expected_output: The response reuses the existing issue artifact instead of starting a new location, keeps the confirmed header fixed in every variant, and varies only the preset placement. After the user reacts it folds the chosen placement into the issue artifact and discards the losing variant.
expectations: It reuses artifacts/url-to-md/ rather than creating a new artifact location.
Every variant keeps the confirmed header composition fixed.
The variants differ materially only on preset placement.
It asks for the user's reaction to settle the one question.
It folds the confirmed choice into the issue artifact and discards the losing variants.

evals.prompt: /prototype 우리 팀 주간 회고를 정리해주는 내부 도구를 만들려고 해. 화면이 어때야 할지 아직 감이 전혀 없어. 회고 항목은 잘된 점, 아쉬운 점, 액션 아이템이야. 말로 물어보지 말고 일단 구체적인 걸 보여주면 반응하면서 정할게.
evals.expected_output: With no governing fork identified, the response builds a single strawman from the stated requirements instead of variants or a prose interview. The draft covers the three retro sections with representative fake data at shippable visual quality, and it invites the user's reaction, ready to record what each reaction confirms.
expectations: The response builds one strawman rather than multiple variants, because no governing fork has been identified.
The draft covers the stated sections (잘된 점, 아쉬운 점, 액션 아이템) with representative fake data.
It invites the user's reaction instead of asking abstract preference questions first.
The build has the visual credibility of a shippable product rather than a gray-box wireframe.
It treats reactions as decisions to record rather than objections to argue against.

evals.prompt: /prototype artifacts/url-to-md/ 이슈의 결정이 전부 끝났어. 헤더는 제목·저자·읽기 시간 구성, 프리셋 선택은 본문 위 라디오, 다크 모드 토글은 헤더 오른쪽으로 확정했어. 이제 확정안 전체를 클릭해볼 수 있는 한 화면으로 완성해줘.
evals.expected_output: Because every decision is confirmed, the response materializes the issue artifact's final state: one clickable composition reflecting all confirmed decisions, with representative data and no alternative variants. It reopens nothing and presents the result as the session's deliverable — a record of confirmed decisions, not production code.
expectations: The response builds exactly one composition reflecting every confirmed decision, with no alternative variants.
It completes artifacts/url-to-md/ rather than creating a new artifact location.
It does not reopen or offer options on any confirmed decision.
The composition is clickable with representative data and shippable-level styling.
It presents the result as the issue artifact's final state, a record of confirmed decisions rather than production code.
